title: Looking for Monday expert in Istanbul
excerpt: Looking for a Monday expert to set up our workflow processes, automations & integrations in Turkey, Istanbul.

posts.author: Marina1 (Marina)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for a Monday expert to set up our workflow processes, automations & integrations in Turkey, Istanbul.

posts.author: SegunMichael (Oluwasegun Michael Gbadegesin)
posts.cookedHtml: I know of an expert, trusted and certified, who can help you with a solution to this, on Fiverr. He has been of great assistance to my business, you may want to reach out to him, I’m certain he will be ready and available to assist you. He is Lorenzo. Contact him via this link - https://www.fiverr.com/s2/812d98e528

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am a certified monday.com professional specialized in process improvement, automations, integrations and designing custom workflows.

Highlights :-

  1. Board Setup
  2. Board Optimization
  3. Process Automations
  4. Dashboard Creation
  5. Individual & Team Training
  6. Integrations with external apps
  7. Develop an app to consume the API of an external app and integrate it on monday.com.

Let me know if you’re looking to connect remote, I can help you out with this.

Regards,
Aquib

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Marina1

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. We have many internationally based clients and can certainly assist.

Best first step is a conversation! Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your use case.

international clients - special hours

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Damco Solutions can help. We’re one of the recognized partners of monday com, our dedicated monday.com consultants can help organizations and teams of all sizes effectively implement monday com - both for accomplishing everyday tasks and organizing huge enterprise-wide projects.

Our experts can provide 24x7 support remotely and help your business with customized workflow development so that your workforce can track task progress, and objectives, and align work across different teams like sales, HR, marketing, etc. with better transparency. Through meticulous monday com bot deployment, the consultants can also help automate your workflows and boost your teams’ productivity by unlocking the power of automation.

Regards
Neelam B
